notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa walks. Jose Fernandez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa pops out to first baseman Michael Busch in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte grounds into a force out, second baseman Matt Shaw to shortstop Dansby Swanson. Ildemaro Vargas out at 2nd. Ketel Marte to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw grounds out softly, pitcher Zac Gallen to first baseman Jose Fernandez.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Zac Gallen. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores. Dansby Swanson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Matt Shaw. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd. Ildemaro Vargas advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Matt Shaw.
